nodes.label: Convert documents of various input formats to Docling documents.      `Documen
Initialize the converter based on format preferences.          Args:
Generate a hash of pipeline options to use as part of the cache key.
Initialize the conversion pipeline for the selected format.          Args:
Convert one document fetched from a file path, URL, or DocumentStream.
Convert multiple documents from file paths, URLs, or DocumentStreams.
Convert a document given as a string using the specified format.          Only
Retrieve or initialize a pipeline, reusing instances based on class and options.
